steps.title: Use same-side angles
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $n$ is a transversal. The marked $28^\circ$ angle and $x$ are same-side interior angles, so they are supplementary.

steps.title: Subtract from a straight angle
steps.content: Set their sum equal to $180^\circ$ and solve. $$x+28=180$$ $$x=180-28=152$$ The answer is 152.
